author: y4rr
content: [result] Massive f64 expansion complete. 65 f64 PTX kernel constants and 108 launcher functions now cover every operation category: arithmetic (add/sub/mul/div/neg/scale), unary (exp/log/sqrt/pow/abs/sigmoid/tanh/relu), backward (relu/sigmoid/tanh/gelu 3 modes/silu/elu/mish/softmax/log_softmax), broadcast (add/sub/mul/div), reduction (reduce_sum/sum_axis), cumulative (cumsum/cumprod/cummax/cummin/logcumsumexp), norm (layernorm/rmsnorm/batchnorm + backwards), indexing (index_select/scatter_add/masked_fill/masked_zero/slice_read/slice_write/embed_lookup), shape (transpose/permute/strided_split/strided_cat), pooling (maxpool2d/avgpool2d), clamp. All 3255 tests pass, clean compile.
